title: pellionia viridis var. viridis
intro: Pellionia viridis var. viridis, also known as the green pellionia, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Pellionia viridis var. viridis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, although its availability and usage are often limited due to its restricted cultivation and conservation status.
